heading: Omitted
label: 264, 265 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 264, , , which related to Pan American Union, was superseded by Convention of 1928, ratified by the United States and providing that the government of Pan American Union should be vested in a governing board.act Aug. 18, 1894, ch. 30128 Stat. 418Section 265, , , which was from an appropriation act, related to disposition of receipts of Pan American Union, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Jan. 25, 1929, ch. 102, title I45 Stat. 1102
